entry.title: Code Red
entry.summary:
Author: Maybe_Here

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,803Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 222

Summary: Flatmates can be a real gamble. Sometimes they're normal. Sometimes they wear masks and wield guns. You move to Gotham to start at a new job at the General Hospital, but with limited options you have to move into a sketchy apartment.

entry.title: The Way You See Me
entry.summary:
Author: Xivkyn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,023Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 88

Summary: After being an experiment to Hugo Strange for the majority of your life you finally escape. The trauma of your time there follows you as you remember the screams and death all around you. You don't even know your own name as the number 'Seven' was the only semblance of a name you were given. You have no one to go home to and nothing you look forward to except for revenge. It consumes your every thought ever since you escaped. You want him to feel the pain he caused you and your friends.Limited y/n usage

entry.title: When Luck Smiles Your Way
entry.summary:
Author: Marras_23

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,743Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 21

Summary: After having a life as complicated as the one he had, Jason thought that his luck wouldn't face him until the day of his (second) death. But, the universe always had ways of surprising him. And now, he had to deal with the feelings that a fortunate meeting had left him even if he had no idea how.

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 132,966Chapters: 27/?Kudos: 792

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,527Chapters: 6/25Kudos: 211

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books. Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood. Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: People Aren't Good
entry.summary:
Author: Miss_nightshade

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,107Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 128

Summary: Hecate has spent her life tucked into the bruised edges of Gotham’s Narrows, pretending to be a small, harmless girl with nothing worth noticing. It’s a fragile lie, but it holds. She goes to school. She walks home alone. She returns to a house that feels older than she is, a place that hums with magic she refuses to touch. She keeps her power buried. She ignores the ancient voices whispering inside her. She does everything she can to stay unseen. And for years, it works. Until the night it doesn’t.

entry.title: Baby bump
entry.summary:
Author: Kandyscorner

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,062Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 689

Summary: requested on tumblr:okay so the reader finding out she’s pregnant with Jason’s baby but doesn’t want to tell him because she’s scared of his reaction and tries to leave without telling him but he finds out anyway? (could it be angst to fluff and include the batfamily?) More has been added. Girl Dad! Jason Todd to follow.

entry.title: Still Him, Somehow
entry.summary:
Author: Oxylli

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,335Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Losing her childhood best friend was the worst thing that was ever to happen to Melia, she thinks, running a simple life full of trouble and piles of books to run away from her lonely past and move on from Jason. Just as life starts making sense again, the new and most annnoying red-headed vigilante decides to take his claim over the streets of Gotham. To say she hates him is an understatement. Unbeknownst to her, the new vigilante is exactly the person she's needed for all these years she had lost him. Him on the other hand is hellbent on making sure she never finds out how far the two of them actually go back. Unfortunately for both of them, the universe decides its been long enough that they've been apart, and does everything in its power to force them back together.
